actuals.note: No history.json found — no hours logged yet this week (Jul 20–26)

recommendation.summary: All categories at zero, and this is genuinely the last week to catch Monet and Venice at the de Young — it closes Sunday, July 26, the same week the Legion's Drawn to Venice companion show also winds down. No fresh professional postings cleared verification this cycle (last week's Dropbox lead turned out to be closed), so lean on the CFPs already in the pipeline — both still have a month-plus runway — rather than waiting on new roles to appear.

suggested.title: Monet and Venice at the de Young — final days, closes Sunday July 26
Draft a submission for the Global Data & AI Virtual Tech Conference CFP (deadline Aug 22)
